title: astelia hastata
intro: Astelia hastata, also known as Astelia or Red Flash, is a unique New Zealand native plant with silver-green, strap-like leaves that form a fan-like shape. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. These benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Astelia hastata can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health needs.
